examples: This made Issa both angry and sad.
One night, during a party his students gave him, Issa composed a hundred haiku!
Issa told the Times a few months ago, “You can call me a pain. I’ll accept that as a compliment.”
Representative DARRELL ISSA (Republican, California): How much skin do you still have in Citibank?
Republican and committee chairman Darrell Issa accused Holder of keeping important email information from Congress.
